title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V. RESTROOM ACCESS ACT

§1300.41. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Restroom Access Act".

            Acts 2021, No. 444, §1; Acts 2022, No. 271, §9A; Acts 2022, No. 358, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1123.1.
doc_text:
PART V.  RESTROOM ACCESS ACT
§1300.41.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Restroom Access Act".
Acts 2021, No. 444, §1; Acts 2022, No. 271, §9A; Acts 2022, No. 358, §1;
Redesignated from R.S. 40:1123.1.
